variants: Neela Arora, an expert in Equine Science, has dedicated her professional career to the advancement of this field. Her doctoral studies were greatly influenced by her mentor, Anjali Sinha, who provided invaluable guidance throughout her academic journey. Neela's research endeavors are largely supported by the Kindle Spark Innovation Trust, which helps fund her innovative projects. Beyond her work in equine science, she also holds an Illusionist Culinary Permit, reflecting her eclectic array of interests. Her scholarly contributions have been published by Prairie Finch Publishing, allowing her findings to reach a wider audience.
